feed.title: Çağatay Özcan Jagiello Gutt - update
feed.subtitle: Cognitive Science Student (M.Sc.) & Molecular Biologist (B.Sc.) | Artificial Consciousness, BCI & HMI Research | Physiological Computing & AI

entry.title: Project Update: AnalysisToolbox
entry.content:
Recent activity in AnalysisToolbox:

Recent Commits

  • d08b089 refactor: remove unused suffix parameter from multiple analyzers and update usag
  • 8c8edb2 fix: clean up stale git state after timed-out operations in finalize workflows
  • 01132a6 refactor: streamline function parameters and improve output handling across mult
  • 854237c Add condition profile processor and log to parquet utility
  • f276def fix: update OLS processor to handle folder input and improve logging; refactor p

This project is actively maintained as part of my commitment to open and transparent science.

View on GitHub → | See all projects →

This project is actively maintained as part of my commitment to open and transparent science.

entry.title: Website Update
entry.content:
This website has been updated with the following changes:

Recent Changes

  • 257b3c1 fix: use plain fetch for parquet (no range requests), scrollable README
  • 8759052 No auto-open on expand, .log.parquet as log files, all parquet only
  • 1492a88 Ignore dotfiles/dotdirs, per-repo pipeline data, cache v2
  • 5b965af Recursive tree rendering: mirror exact repo folder structure
  • 2fb75ff Flat folder discovery: show all files from results dirs, README at bottom

The site continues to sync automatically with GitHub (projects) and ORCID (publications).

View source on GitHub →
